title: Hierarchical Classification of Computer Network Types
description: A flowchart that categorizes computer networks based on their geographical coverage and scale, showing the relationship and hierarchy between different network types.
relationships: Network branches into PAN, LAN, MAN, and WAN based on scale
LANs can be interconnected to form a MAN
WANs interconnect LANs and MANs over large distances
The global Internet is the ultimate internetwork formed by connecting WANs
